figures.caption: Fig. 1. Illustration of the proposed V2A-DPO framework, including (a) our proposed AudioScore to rate the generated audio with multidimensional scores; (b) omni-preference pair data generation combining the automatically generated preference pairs based on AudioScore with a small amount of human-annotated preference pairs; (c) curriculum learning-empowered DPO to optimize V2A models on the complex and simple pairs gradually, which are split according to complexity score scorec.
Table 2. Ablation study on the effect of the KL divergence constraint parameter β and preset threshold score∆ on the performance of optimized MMAudio using V2A-DPO.
